chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 170 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 14.10.2025. None present for the applicant. Same was the position on the last two dates of hearing. It appears that the applicant has lost his interest in pursuing this Criminal Miscellaneous Application which is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Tufail
